facts.claim: The World's Best Family Vacation, Star of the Seas is now sailing from Port Canaveral as the newest Icon Class ship.
Star of the Seas is a cruise ship operated by Royal Caribbean International and is the second Icon-class cruise ship, the first being Icon of the Seas.
At 248,663 gross tonnage (GT), Star of the Seas shares the title of the largest cruise ship in the world with her sister ships.
